text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Yeah, I really need to get my position right
by the fourth corner.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
As long as I do that and maintain the lap time I
always have...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, who am I kidding. Get your head out of
the clouds, Ms. Third Place.
